resources.string:
"
 Browse thousands of classic books
 Search anything you're looking for
 Save your favorites to read later
 Works offline once you've loaded books
 "

"
 Kotlin, Room, Retrofit, Hilt
 MVVM, Coroutines, Flow
 Material Design 3
 "
A simple app to read classic literature from Project Gutenberg. Free books, no ads, works offline.
